metric_definitions.angular_rate_norm_radps: Touchdown body-rate vector norm in rad/s.
metric_definitions.failure_modes: Semicolon-delimited failure taxonomy labels from the shared touchdown metric function.
metric_definitions.fuel_used_kg: Initial vehicle mass minus final vehicle mass in kilograms.
metric_definitions.horizontal_touchdown_velocity_mps: Horizontal touchdown speed magnitude in m/s.
metric_definitions.landing_position_error_m: Euclidean lateral landing error at touchdown in meters.
metric_definitions.success_rate: Fraction of evaluated episodes satisfying all touchdown success criteria.
metric_definitions.termination_reason: Terminal rollout status such as touchdown, timeout, or divergence.
metric_definitions.tilt_angle_deg: Touchdown tilt angle between body +z and inertial +z in degrees.
metric_definitions.touchdown_detected: Whether the rollout ended by ground contact rather than timeout/divergence.
metric_definitions.touchdown_speed_mps: Total touchdown speed magnitude in m/s.
metric_definitions.vertical_touchdown_velocity_mps: Signed vertical touchdown velocity in m/s; negative is downward.
